commit.subject: LU-12608 kernel: kernel update RHEL7.6 [3.10.0-957.27.2.el7]
commit.message:
LU-12608 kernel: kernel update RHEL7.6 [3.10.0-957.27.2.el7]

Update RHEL7.6 kernel to 3.10.0-957.27.2.el7.
